title: He sent a harsh email to ICE's top official. Federal agents tracked him down
abstract: This tool analyzes and summarizes the content of a contentious email sent to the highest-ranking official at ICE, providing insights into its tone and implications.
abstract_zh: 这工具真是高手啊！它能把ICE最高层收到的那封辩论满满的邮件给掰扯清楚，还告诉你它语气咋回事、后果啥样，听得我这个外行都直夸它牛逼！
